hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: OUTPUT_BASE_DIR
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: 杈撳嚭鍩虹鐩綍锛堢敱 apk-site 鍐欏叆锛屼笌 APK_DIR 涓€鑷达級

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "=======================================" echo " GameKu Android 鏋勫缓 (Jenkins)" echo "=======================================" echo "" echo "鏋勫缓鍙傛暟:" echo " Unity 鐗堟湰: $UNITY_VERSION" echo " 鐗堟湰鍙? $VERSION_NAME" echo " 鐗堟湰浠ｇ爜: $VERSION_CODE" echo " 搴旂敤鍚嶇О: $APP_NAME" echo " Git 鍒嗘敮: ${GIT_BRANCH:-榛樿}"
# 鑻ラ厤缃簡 GIT_URL 涓?Git 宸ヤ綔鐩綍锛屽厛鎷夊彇/鏇存柊浠ｇ爜锛堜娇鐢ㄥ疄渚?.apk-site-env 涓殑 GIT_URL銆丟IT_SSH_KEY_PATH銆丟IT_WORKSPACE锛?[ -n "$JENKINS_HOME" ] && [ -f "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" ] && . "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" if [ -n "$GIT_URL" ] && [ -n "$GIT_WORKSPACE" ]; then echo "姝ラ: Git 鎷夊彇/鏇存柊 ($GIT_WORKSPACE)" if [ -n "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ] && [ -f "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ]; then export GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i $GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" fi BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}" [ "${BRANCH#origin/}" != "$BRANCH" ] && LOCAL_BRANCH="${BRANCH#origin/}" || LOCAL_BRANCH="$BRANCH" set +e if [ -d "$GIT_WORKSPACE/.git" ]; then (cd "$GIT_WORKSPACE" && git fetch origin 2>&1 || true && \ if git rev-parse -q --verify "origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then \ git checkout -B "$LOCAL_BRANCH" "origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH"; \ else \ echo "杩滅▼鏃?origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH锛屽皾璇曚娇鐢ㄦ湰鍦板垎鏀?quot;; \ git checkout "$LOCAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true; \ fi) else mkdir -p "$(dirname "$GIT_WORKSPACE")" git clone -b "$LOCAL_BRANCH" "$GIT_URL" "$GIT_WORKSPACE" || true fi set -e echo "Git 鎷夊彇瀹屾垚" fi
# 鍙€夛細鍏堟墽琛屼紶缁?APK 鏋勫缓鑴氭湰锛堝晢涓氭祦姘寸嚎榛樿鍏抽棴锛岄€氳繃 RUN_BASE_APK_BUILD_FIRST=true 寮€鍚級 if [ "${RUN_BASE_APK_BUILD_FIRST:-true}" = "true" ]; then bash ~/build_gameku_android.sh else echo "璺宠繃鍩虹 APK 棰勬瀯寤猴紙RUN_BASE_APK_BUILD_FIRST=false锛? fi
echo "" echo "======= 鍙彃鎷旂増鏈瀯寤烘祦姘寸嚎 =======" [ -n "$JENKINS_HOME" ] && [ -f "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" ] && . "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env"
_resolve_unity_exe() { local ver="${UNITY_VERSION:-6000.3.8f1}" local map_file="${UNITY_PATH_MAP_FILE:-${JENKINS_HOME}/unity_paths.json}" local resolved="" if [ -f "$map_file" ]; then resolved=$(UNITY_VERSION="$ver" UNITY_PATH_MAP_FILE="$map_file" python3 -c "import json,os; m=json.load(open(os.environ['UNITY_PATH_MAP_FILE'])); print((m.get(os.environ.get('UNITY_VERSION','')) or '').strip())" 2>/dev/null || echo "") fi if [ -n "$resolved" ] && [ -d "$resolved" ] && [ -f "$resolved/Contents/MacOS/Unity" ]; then resolved="$resolved/Contents/MacOS/Unity" fi if [ -z "$resolved" ] || [ ! -f "$resolved" ]; then for CAND in \ "/Applications/Unity/Hub/Editor/${ver}/Unity.app/Contents/MacOS/Unity" \ "$HOME/Applications/Unity/Hub/Editor/${ver}/Unity.app/Contents/MacOS/Unity" do if [ -f "$CAND" ]; then resolved="$CAND" break fi done fi if [ -z "$resolved" ] || [ ! -f "$resolved" ]; then if [ -n "${UNITY_HUB:-}" ] && [ "${UNITY_HUB}" != "/" ]; then local hub_cand="${UNITY_HUB%/}/Editor/${ver}/Unity.app/Contents/MacOS/Unity" if [ -f "$hub_cand" ]; then resolved="$hub_cand" fi fi fi if [ -n "$resolved" ] && [ -f "$resolved" ]; then echo "$resolved" fi } UNITY_PATH="$(_resolve_unity_exe)" echo "Unity 鍙墽琛屾枃浠? ${UNITY_PATH:-锛堟湭瑙ｆ瀽锛墋"
_run_unity() { local METHOD="$1"; shift if [ ! -f "$UNITY_PATH" ]; then echo "鈿?Unity 璺緞鏃犳晥: $UNITY_PATH"; return 1; fi local PROJECT_PATH="${UNITY_PROJECT_PATH:-}" if [ -z "$PROJECT_PATH" ] || [ ! -d "$PROJECT_PATH/Assets" ]; then local SEARCH_ROOTS=() [ -n "$GIT_WORKSPACE" ] && SEARCH_ROOTS+=("$GIT_WORKSPACE") [ -n "$JENKINS_CLONE" ] && SEARCH_ROOTS+=("$(dirname "$JENKINS_CLONE")" "$(dirname "$(dirname "$JENKINS_CLONE")")") [ -n "$OUTPUT_BASE_DIR" ] && SEARCH_ROOTS+=("$(dirname "$OUTPUT_BASE_DIR")") local ROOT for ROOT in "${SEARCH_ROOTS[@]}"; do [ -d "$ROOT" ] || continue local CANDIDATE CANDIDATE=$(find "$ROOT" -maxdepth 4 -type d -name Assets 2>/dev/null | while read -r A; do P="$(dirname "$A")" if [ -d "$P/Assets/Editor" ] && [ -d "$P/ProjectSettings" ]; then echo "$P" break fi done) if [ -n "$CANDIDATE" ]; then PROJECT_PATH="$CANDIDATE" break fi done fi if [ -z "$PROJECT_PATH" ] || [ ! -d "$PROJECT_PATH/Assets/Editor" ]; then echo "鈿?Unity 椤圭洰鐩綍鏈厤缃垨缂哄皯 Assets/Editor锛堝彲浼?UNITY_PROJECT_PATH锛屾垨閰嶇疆 GIT_WORKSPACE锛? return 1 fi local UNITY_TIMEOUT_SEC="${UNITY_CLI_TIMEOUT_SEC:-7200}" local ARGS="-batchmode -nographics -disableAssemblyUpdater -quitTimeout ${UNITY_TIMEOUT_SEC} -projectPath \"$PROJECT_PATH\" -executeMethod $METHOD $*" echo "Unity Project: $PROJECT_PATH" echo "鈫?鎵ц: $UNITY_PATH $ARGS" export UNITY_EDITOR_DISABLE_EXTERNAL_UPDATES=1 set +e UNITY_LOG="$(mktemp)" eval "$UNITY_PATH" $ARGS 2>&1 | tee "$UNITY_LOG" local UNITY_EC=${PIPESTATUS[0]} set -e if [ $UNITY_EC -ne 0 ]; then if grep -qE '\[ReleaseUpload\]\[AliyunOSS\]|\[M09-08B\]\[CLI\] ExitCode=0 Success=True|\[ApkReleaseUploadCli\] APK upload completed|Upload prepared.*provider=aliyun' "$UNITY_LOG" 2>/dev/null; then echo "鈿?Unity 閫€鍑虹爜 $UNITY_EC锛屼絾妫€娴嬪埌 CLI 鎴愬姛鏃ュ織锛岀户缁祦姘寸嚎" rm -f "$UNITY_LOG" return 0 fi echo "鈿?Unity 閫€鍑虹爜: $UNITY_EC" rm -f "$UNITY_LOG" return $UNITY_EC fi rm -f "$UNITY_LOG" }
# Step 1: 閰嶇疆瀵煎嚭鍙戝竷锛堥€氳繃鍟嗕笟绾?CLI 鐨?config 鐩爣鎵ц锛涗笂浼犺蛋 Unity OSSConfig.json / 闃块噷浜?OSS锛?if [ "${CONFIG_EXPORT_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then echo "=== Step 1: 閰嶇疆瀵煎嚭鍙戝竷 ===" echo "涓婁紶: Unity 椤圭洰 Assets/Editor/Configs/OSSConfig.json (aliyun-oss)" CFG_ARGS="-commercialReleaseMode \"${RELEASE_MODE:-build-upload}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseTargets \"config\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseVersion \"${CONFIG_CLIENT_VERSION:-${RELEASE_VERSION:-1.0.0}}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseEnvironment \"${CONFIG_ENVIRONMENT:-${RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT:-Development}}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releasePlatform \"${CONFIG_PLATFORM:-${RELEASE_PLATFORM:-Android}}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseChannel \"${RELEASE_CHANNEL:-common}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseUploadMode \"${RELEASE_UPLOAD_MODE:-incremental}\"" CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releaseUpload \"${RELEASE_UPLOAD:-true}\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}" ] && [ -f "${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}" ] && CFG_ARGS="$CFG_ARGS -releasePlanFile \"${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}\"" _run_unity CommercialReleaseCli.ExecuteFromCommandLine $CFG_ARGS || exit $? echo "Step 1 瀹屾垚" else echo "Step 1 (閰嶇疆瀵煎嚭) 宸茶烦杩? fi
# Step 2: 璧勬簮鎵撳寘锛堣皟鐢?M09-08B 璧勬簮娴佹按绾?CLI锛?if [ "${RESOURCE_BUILD_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then echo "=== Step 2: 璧勬簮鎵撳寘 ===" if [ "${RESOURCE_CLEAN_VERSION:-true}" = "true" ]; then VER_ROOT="${UNITY_PROJECT_PATH:-${GIT_WORKSPACE:-}}" if [ -n "$VER_ROOT" ]; then VER_DIR="$VER_ROOT/Builds/${RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT:-Development}/${RELEASE_CHANNEL:-common}/${RELEASE_PLATFORM:-Android}/Version_${RELEASE_VERSION:-${VERSION_NAME:-1.0.0}}" if [ -d "$VER_DIR" ]; then rm -rf "$VER_DIR" echo "宸叉竻鐞嗙増鏈洰褰? $VER_DIR" fi fi fi RP_ARGS="-m09bMode \"build\"" RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bVersion \"${RELEASE_VERSION:-${VERSION_NAME:-1.0.0}}\"" RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bEnvironment \"${RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT:-Development}\"" RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bChannel \"${RELEASE_CHANNEL:-common}\"" RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bPlatform \"${RELEASE_PLATFORM:-Android}\"" [ -n "${RESOURCE_PROVIDER}" ] && RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bProvider \"${RESOURCE_PROVIDER}\"" if [ -n "${RESOURCE_SCENARIO}" ] && [[ "${RESOURCE_SCENARIO}" == *"/"* || "${RESOURCE_SCENARIO}" == *.json ]]; then RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bScenario \"${RESOURCE_SCENARIO}\"" fi RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bCleanVersion \"${RESOURCE_CLEAN_VERSION:-true}\"" RP_ARGS="$RP_ARGS -m09bBridgeStrict \"${RESOURCE_BRIDGE_STRICT:-false}\" -m09bAcceptanceStrict \"${RESOURCE_ACCEPTANCE_STRICT:-false}\"" _run_unity ResourcePipelineCli.ExecuteFromCommandLine $RP_ARGS || exit $? echo "Step 2 瀹屾垚" else echo "Step 2 (璧勬簮鎵撳寘) 宸茶烦杩? fi
# Step 3: 浠ｇ爜+璧勬簮鐑洿鍙戝竷锛堟瀯寤?鍘嬬缉+绛惧悕+涓婁紶闃块噷浜戯紝閰嶇疆/浠ｇ爜/璧勬簮鍖呭潎璧?CommercialReleaseCli锛?if [ "${HOT_RELEASE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then echo "=== Step 3: 浠ｇ爜+璧勬簮鐑洿鍙戝竷 ===" echo "涓婁紶: Unity 椤圭洰 Assets/Editor/Configs/OSSConfig.json (aliyun-oss)" HR_ARGS="-releaseVersion \"${RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.1}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseEnvironment \"${RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT:-Development}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseChannel \"${RELEASE_CHANNEL:-common}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releasePlatform \"${RELEASE_PLATFORM:-Android}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseTargets \"${RELEASE_TARGETS:-code,resource}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseHotLabels \"${RELEASE_HOT_LABELS:-hotupdate,aotmeta}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseUploadMode \"${RELEASE_UPLOAD_MODE:-incremental}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseUpload \"${RELEASE_UPLOAD:-true}\"" HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -commercialReleaseMode \"${RELEASE_MODE:-build-upload}\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}" ] && [ -f "${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releasePlanFile \"${RELEASE_PLAN_FILE}\"" [ "${RELEASE_ACTIVATE:-false}" = "true" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseActivate \"true\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_COMPRESSION_OVERRIDE}" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseCompressionOverride \"${RELEASE_COMPRESSION_OVERRIDE}\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_ENCRYPTION_OVERRIDE}" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseEncryptionOverride \"${RELEASE_ENCRYPTION_OVERRIDE}\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_SIGNATURE_OVERRIDE}" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseSignatureOverride \"${RELEASE_SIGNATURE_OVERRIDE}\"" [ -n "${RELEASE_ROLLBACK_TARGET}" ] && HR_ARGS="$HR_ARGS -releaseRollbackTarget \"${RELEASE_ROLLBACK_TARGET}\"" _run_unity CommercialReleaseCli.ExecuteFromCommandLine $HR_ARGS || exit $? echo "Step 3 瀹屾垚" else echo "Step 3 (鐑洿鍙戝竷) 宸茶烦杩? fi
# Step 4: APK 鎵撳寘 + 涓婁紶闃块噷浜?if [ "${APK_BUILD_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then echo "=== Step 4: APK 鎵撳寘 ===" export UNITY_PROJECT_PATH="${UNITY_PROJECT_PATH:-${GIT_WORKSPACE:-}}" export UNITY_VERSION="${UNITY_VERSION:-6000.3.8f1}" export VERSION_NAME="${VERSION_NAME:-${RELEASE_VERSION:-1.0.0}}" export VERSION_CODE="${VERSION_CODE:-1}" export APP_NAME="${APP_NAME:-GameKu}" export OUTPUT_BASE_DIR="${OUTPUT_BASE_DIR:-${APK_DIR:-}}" export GIT_BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}" bash ~/build_gameku_android.sh || exit $? echo "=== Step 4b: APK 涓婁紶闃块噷浜?===" echo "涓婁紶: Unity 椤圭洰 Assets/Editor/Configs/OSSConfig.json (aliyun-oss)" APK_SEARCH="${OUTPUT_BASE_DIR:-${APK_DIR:-}}" APK_FILE="" if [ -n "$APK_SEARCH" ] && [ -d "$APK_SEARCH" ]; then APK_FILE=$(find "$APK_SEARCH" -name "*.apk" -type f -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 ls -t 2>/dev/null | head -n 1) fi if [ -z "$APK_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$APK_FILE" ]; then echo "鈿?鏈壘鍒?APK 鏂囦欢锛屾悳绱㈢洰褰? $APK_SEARCH" exit 1 fi echo "APK 鏂囦欢: $APK_FILE" APK_UP_ARGS="-apkFile \"$APK_FILE\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -releaseVersion \"${RELEASE_VERSION:-${VERSION_NAME:-1.0.0}}\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -releaseEnvironment \"${RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT:-Development}\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -releaseChannel \"${RELEASE_CHANNEL:-common}\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -releasePlatform \"${RELEASE_PLATFORM:-Android}\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -projectRoot \"${RELEASE_PROJECT_ROOT:-MyGame1}\"" APK_UP_ARGS="$APK_UP_ARGS -appName \"${APP_NAME:-GameKu}\"" _run_unity ApkReleaseUploadCli.ExecuteFromCommandLine $APK_UP_ARGS || exit $? echo "Step 4 瀹屾垚锛堝惈 APK 涓婁紶锛? else echo "Step 4 (APK鎵撳寘) 宸茶烦杩? fi
echo "======= 娴佹按绾挎墽琛屽畬姣?======="
